concerns.text: FR-011 clarification is formatted as a separate note rather than integrated into the requirement. The proxy variable logic is testable but should be part of FR-011 itself for unified verification.

Independent Test states '≥ 95 % of the expected records' but 'expected records' is not defined. Specify how the expected record count baseline is determined (e.g., total available records in source API).

Edge Cases are phrased as questions rather than testable scenarios. Convert to acceptance criteria (e.g., 'Given dataset lacks engagement variables, When preprocessing runs, Then system flags limitation and documents reduced construct validity').
SC-005 allows null results as acceptable success. Clarify that documenting a null result (no predictor meets p < 0.05 threshold) satisfies the criterion, not just achieving significance.
